/bin/g++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g CMakeFiles/appMyApp.dir/appMyApp_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/appMyApp.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/appMyApp.dir/backend/src/SystemMonitor.cpp.o
